meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Tutorial
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with SaaS architecture. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional, scalable apps in record time.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates the 'no SaaS knowledge' barrier by providing a pre-configured, production-ready boilerplate. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate setup, database integration, and auth, allowing you to focus purely on high-value feature development rather than wrestling with complex infrastructure configurations.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the weight of a client’s deadline pressing against your temples. You know how to code, but the labyrinthine world of SaaS architecture—auth flows, database schemas, and billing hooks—feels like a wall you aren't equipped to climb. The industry demands speed, yet you’re stuck reinventing the wheel.

This stops today. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it’s a blueprint for professional execution. By leveraging Claude Code to orchestrate this framework, you transform from a struggling developer into a high-velocity architect. We are going to strip away the complexity and get you to your first deployment before the sun sets.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure. This step ensures your environment is standardized, preventing configuration drift before you even write a line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise-ready SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Identity and Access Management
steps.description: Auth is the biggest bottleneck for freelancers. We use the template's pre-built modules to implement secure, scalable user management instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate the Antigravity Auth module. Set up user roles, protected routes, and email verification workflows.

steps.title: Define Your Data Schema
steps.description: Translate your client's business requirements into a robust database schema without manual SQL migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for users, profiles, and subscription plans.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply prisma schema updates from antigravity-schema-helper'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Gateways
steps.description: Move beyond fake buttons. Implement real-world billing hooks that handle subscriptions and webhooks automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Connect Stripe to the Antigravity template. Configure webhook handlers for subscription success and cancellation events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup stripe billing endpoints using antigravity-payments-pkg'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize your build and push to a live environment. We ensure all environment variables and build pipelines are optimized for speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify production configuration and generate deployment scripts for Vercel/AWS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'finalize build and generate deployment instructions'

pro_tips: Always treat the Antigravity template as immutable; keep your custom logic in separate 'feature' directories to ensure easy future updates.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your client's specific business context, reducing prompt repetition across sessions.
Automate your database migrations by linking the Antigravity CLI to your CI/CD pipeline, ensuring schema consistency across dev and prod.
Leverage the template's built-in logging module to catch errors before your client does; treat logs as your primary debugging UI.
When a client requests a new feature, don't write it from scratch—ask Claude Code to identify the closest Antigravity module to extend.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, focus on building your 'Hero Feature'—the one unique value proposition your client is paying for—while keeping the infrastructure layer untouched.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start shipping like a senior engineer. Our template ecosystem saves you 20+ hours per project, giving you the competitive edge to scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
